name: pre_existing_temporal_delete_hang
drl:
rule TJ0 when $a : E0() $b : E2(this before[0ms,100ms] $a) then end
rule TJ1 salience 3 when $a : E0() $b : E2(this before[50ms,100ms] $a) then end
rule CH2 when $a : E0() $b : E1(this before[0ms,50ms] $a) $c : E2(this before[50ms,100ms] $b) then end
rule J3 when $e : E1($t : tag) then insertLogical(new D($t)); end
rule RD4 salience 6 when D() then end
rule ND5 salience 3 when not D() P() then end
_finding: PRE-EXISTING (NOT item D) engine NON-TERMINATION: this temporal-join + delete + advance shape spins in next_activation/fire_all (engine.rs:4089/3935) — the fire limit cannot catch it. Bisected to HEAD (hangs on the pre-item-D engine, zero entry_point refs); flushed by the item-D EP fuzz which draws more temporal+delete combos. E1-HARDENING backlog (temporal+delete non-termination), same family as the temporal-join-order latents. Excluded from all gates/lint (scenarios/hang-backlog not globbed). DO NOT run through the gate — it hangs.
